events.title: StoP exhibition
events.description: The StoP project – districts without intimate partner violence in Kreuzberg is presenting a special double exhibition in the RuDi neighborhood house until April 17th. The photo and poster exhibition against violence against women is about showing your face, living solidarity and making strength visible.
